engine_target: Godot 4.5 stable, macOS (Apple Silicon and Intel where applicable), Compatibility renderer

packages.purpose: Optional organic/sculpted terrain; not needed for the first compact arena.
acceptance: Use a release explicitly tested against Godot 4.5; never track a branch or 'latest'.
On each supported macOS architecture, clear quarantine only after provenance review and open a minimal Compatibility-renderer scene.
Commit only reviewed addon source/approved release contents and retain the release URL, tag, commit, and archive checksum in this file.

packages.purpose: Optional behaviour-tree/state-machine tooling for cosmetic wildlife or NPCs only; never authoritative benchmark decisions.
acceptance: Use a release explicitly tested against Godot 4.5; never track a branch or 'latest'.
Smoke-test editor startup, export, and a cosmetic-only scene on macOS before committing it.
Record the release URL, tag, immutable commit, and archive checksum before installation.
